payload.prompt:
/commit sdlc_implementor feature {"number":5,"title":"fix: normalize .reports paths and enforce app-layer scoping","body":"## Summary

Establishes a consistent `.reports/` taxonomy across all report-writing agents and commands, and enforces the two-layer rule that app reports belong inside the app — not the agentic layer root.

## Path convention
```
.reports/
  ux/agent-browser/<date_app>/       ← ux-walkthrough + agent-browser
  e2e/agent-browser/<adw-id>/        ← test_e2e command
  e2e/playwright/<timestamp>/        ← playwright-validator + MCP config
  review/agent-browser/<adw-id>/     ← review command
```

## Changes
- **ux-walkthrough SKILL.md** — `REPORT_DIR` now `apps/APP/.reports/ux/agent-browser/...` (was `$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.reports/...`)
- **ux-walkthrough report-template.md** — add missing template file
- **playwright-validator agent** — `.qa-reports/` → `.reports/e2e/playwright/`
- **mcp/.mcp.playwright.config.json** — same rename for video recording dir
- **review command** — adopt `.reports/review/agent-browser/` convention
- **test_e2e command** — adopt `.reports/e2e/agent-browser/` convention
- **meta-prompt-template** — comment out CSV validator hook (script path unresolved)"}
